name: Lumen
positioning: Clinical skincare for people who read the ingredient list. Quiet, exact, dermatology-grade — results without theatre. Premium through restraint, never through noise.
audience: Considered 28–45 buyers who treat skincare as maintenance, not ritual cosplay. They value evidence, finish, and calm.

palette.name: Paper
palette.material: matte uncoated card, soft plaster wall

rulebook.negativeSpaceRatio: generous — roughly half the frame is empty, calm space
rulebook.heroPlacement: product slightly off-centre on a third; never dead-centre except the straight-on hero
composition: One subject, one idea per frame
Deliberate, uncluttered staging — props are rare and intentional
Eye-level or slight angles; the low hero used sparingly for impact

lighting.language: soft directional daylight, cool-neutral white balance, gentle falloff
lighting.default: a single large soft key from the side, soft fill, one controlled highlight on the glass shoulder
lighting.avoid: hard flash, warm yellow cast, flat even box light

props: a smear of serum on stone

doNot: No warm yellow/amber colour cast on the scene (the amber is the liquid only)
No clutter, no busy props, no lifestyle theatre
No hard on-camera flash or party energy
No floating product, no CGI/plastic render look
No 'crafted with love', no heritage nostalgia, no wellness-cliché styling
